articles.title: Binance Just Took Over Half A Billion Dollars Worth Of BNB Completely Out Of Circulation In 17th Quarterly Burn
articles.description: On Tuesday, Binance announced that it had burned 1,335,888 BNB valued at approximately $639,462,868. Coin burning is a process by which cryptocurrency miners or exchanges periodically take out a certain portion of coins from circulation to control price through supply restriction. This has been a common practice in the cryptocurrency industry and is done to […]
